description: You are a chemist who has just joined a new laboratory and needs to set up the lab's chemical solvent inventory in SciNote (http://localhost:3000). Log in using admin@scinote.net / inHisHouseAtRlyehDeadCthulhuWaitsDreaming. Create a new inventory named 'Organic Solvents Collection' and import the 15 chemical items from /home/ga/Documents/chemical_inventory.csv. Ensure all items (Acetone, Methanol, Ethanol, Dichloromethane, Chloroform, Diethyl Ether, Hexane, Toluene, Dimethyl Sulfoxide, Tetrahydrofuran, Acetonitrile, Ethyl Acetate, Isopropanol, Dimethylformamide, and Petroleum Ether) are imported with their properties, specifically mapping the CAS Number, Molecular Weight, and Supplier columns.
